title: pilosella peleteriana subsp. ligerica
intro: Pilosella peleteriana subsp. ligerica, also known as Liguicola ligerica, is a rare and lesser-known subspecies of the Pilosella peleteriana plant, a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pilosella peleteriana subsp. ligerica include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and boost the immune system. Traditionally, it is prepared as a tea or tincture, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
